name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual generation of financial statements causes late client reports. We automate the generation and distribution of reports instead of manual spreadsheet preparation and email distribution.
problem_solved: Manual generation of financial statements is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual generation of financial statements is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual spreadsheet preparation and email distribution
